   295→def _plan(
   296→    nodes: list[dict[str, Any]],
   297→    remote: dict[str, Any],
   298→    snapshot: dict[str, Any],
   299→    config: dict[str, Any],
   300→    confirmations: dict[tuple[str, str], str],
   301→) -> dict[str, Any]:
   302→    imports: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   303→    exports: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   304→    conflicts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   305→    tombstones: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   306→    pending: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   307→    patches: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
   308→    next_snapshot: dict[str, Any] = {
   309→        "schema_version": "1.0",
   310→        "nodes": {},
   311→        "updated_at": snapshot.get("updated_at") or utc_now(),
   312→    }
   313→    base_nodes = snapshot.get("nodes", {}) if isinstance(snapshot, dict) else {}
   314→    projects = _config_projects(config)
   315→    beads_issue_by_graph = {
   316→        _node_id(item): (item.get("beads_linkage") or {}).get("bd_issue_id")
   317→        for item in nodes
   318→    }
   319→
   320→    for node in nodes:
   321→        node_id = _node_id(node)
   322→        binding = node.get("tracker_binding")
   323→        if binding == "none":
   324→            continue
   325→        if binding not in {"beads", "github"}:
   326→            raise ContractError(f"{node_id}: unresolved tracker_binding {binding!r}")
   327→        remote_node = _remote_map(remote, binding).get(node_id)
   328→        if remote_node is None:
   329→            linkage = node.get("beads_linkage") if binding == "beads" else node.get("issue_linkage")
   330→            if linkage:
   331→                target = "tombstoned" if binding == "github" else "closed"
   332→                if node.get("status") != target:
   333→                    patches.setdefault(node_id, {})["status"] = target
   334→                    imports.append({"node": node_id, "field": "status", "from": "missing", "to": target})
   335→                    tombstones.append({"node": node_id, "binding": binding, "status": target, "physical_delete": False})
   336→            else:
   337→                pending.append({"node": node_id, "binding": binding, "reason": "external_linkage_missing"})
   338→            continue
   339→        if not isinstance(remote_node, dict):
   340→            raise ContractError(f"{binding} remote node {node_id} must be an object")
   341→        base_node = base_nodes.get(node_id, {}) if isinstance(base_nodes, dict) else {}
   342→        issue_base = base_node.get("issue", {}) if isinstance(base_node, dict) else {}
   343→        local_updated, remote_updated = node.get("updated_at"), remote_node.get("updated_at")
   344→        local_values = {
   345→            "title": node.get("title"),
   346→            "status": _status_to_remote(binding, str(node.get("status"))),
   347→        }
   348→        remote_values = {
   349→            "title": remote_node.get("title"),
   350→            "status": _status_to_remote(binding, _status_from_remote(binding, remote_node)),
   351→        }
   352→        if binding == "github" and remote_node.get("deleted") is True:
   353→            local_values = {"status": local_values["status"]}
   354→            remote_values = {"status": remote_values["status"]}
   355→        if binding == "beads":
   356→            local_values["depends_on"] = sorted(node.get("depends_on", []))
   357→            remote_values["depends_on"] = sorted(remote_node.get("depends_on", []))
   358→        next_issue: dict[str, Any] = {}
   359→        for field in local_values:
   360→            local_value, remote_value = local_values[field], remote_values[field]
   361→            if field == "status" and remote_node.get("deleted") is True:
   362→                choice = "remote"
   363→            else:
   364→                choice = _choose(
   365→                    node_id=node_id,
   366→                    field=field,
   367→                    local=local_value,
   368→                    remote=remote_value,
   369→                    base=issue_base.get(field) if isinstance(issue_base, dict) else None,
   370→                    local_updated=local_updated,
   371→                    remote_updated=remote_updated,
   372→                    confirmation=confirmations.get((node_id, field)),
   373→                )
   374→            if choice == "conflict":
   375→                conflicts.append({
   376→                    "node": node_id, "field": field, "local": local_value, "remote": remote_value,
   377→                    "resolution": "manual", "display_value": remote_value,
   378→                    "confirmation_required": True,
   379→                })
   380→                next_issue[field] = issue_base.get(field, {"local": local_value, "remote": remote_value})
   381→            elif choice == "remote":
   382→                target = _status_from_remote(binding, remote_node) if field == "status" else remote_value
   383→                if node.get(field) != target:
   384→                    patches.setdefault(node_id, {})[field] = target
   385→                    patches[node_id]["updated_at"] = remote_updated or utc_now()
   386→                    record = {"node": node_id, "field": field, "from": node.get(field), "to": target}
   387→                    imports.append(record)
   388→                    if target == "tombstoned":
   389→                        tombstones.append({"node": node_id, "binding": binding, "status": target, "physical_delete": False})
   390→                next_issue[field] = {"local": remote_value, "remote": remote_value}
   391→            elif choice == "local":
   392→                if binding == "beads" and field == "depends_on":
   393→                    for dependency in sorted(set(local_value) - set(remote_value)):
   394→                        if not beads_issue_by_graph.get(dependency):
   395→                            pending.append({"node": node_id, "field": field, "reason": f"dependency linkage missing: {dependency}"})
   396→                            continue
   397→                        exports.append({
   398→                            "node": node_id, "binding": binding, "kind": "dep-add",
   399→                            "dependency": dependency,

400→                            "dependency_issue_id": beads_issue_by_graph[dependency],
   401→                        })
   402→                    for dependency in sorted(set(remote_value) - set(local_value)):
   403→                        if not beads_issue_by_graph.get(dependency):
   404→                            pending.append({"node": node_id, "field": field, "reason": f"dependency linkage missing: {dependency}"})
   405→                            continue
   406→                        exports.append({
   407→                            "node": node_id, "binding": binding, "kind": "dep-remove",
   408→                            "dependency": dependency,
   409→                            "dependency_issue_id": beads_issue_by_graph[dependency],
   410→                        })
   411→                else:
   412→                    exports.append({
   413→                        "node": node_id, "binding": binding, "kind": f"{field}-update",
   414→                        "field": field, "value": local_value,
   415→                    })
   416→                next_issue[field] = {"local": local_value, "remote": local_value}
   417→            else:
   418→                next_issue[field] = {"local": local_value, "remote": remote_value}
   419→
   420→        next_projects: dict[str, Any] = {}
   421→        if binding == "github" and remote_node.get("deleted") is not True:
   422→            remote_projects = remote_node.get("projects", {})
   423→            if not isinstance(remote_projects, dict):
   424→                raise ContractError(f"{node_id}: remote projects must be an object")
   425→            for linkage in node.get("github_project_linkages") or []:
   426→                alias = linkage.get("project_alias")
   427→                if alias not in projects:
   428→                    pending.append({"node": node_id, "alias": alias, "reason": "project_alias_missing_from_config"})
   429→                    continue
   430→                remote_project = remote_projects.get(alias, {})
   431→                if remote_project.get("error"):
   432→                    pending.append({"node": node_id, "alias": alias, "reason": remote_project["error"]})
   433→                    continue
   434→                if linkage.get("item_id") and remote_project.get("item_id") not in {None, linkage.get("item_id")}:
   435→                    conflicts.append({"node": node_id, "alias": alias, "field": "item_id", "resolution": "manual"})
   436→                    continue
   437→                effective_item_id = remote_project.get("item_id") or linkage.get("item_id")
   438→                if not linkage.get("item_id") and remote_project.get("item_id"):
   439→                    linkages = copy.deepcopy(
   440→                        patches.get(node_id, {}).get(
   441→                            "github_project_linkages", node.get("github_project_linkages") or []
   442→                        )
   443→                    )
   444→                    adopted = next(
   445→                        (item for item in linkages if item.get("project_alias") == alias), None
   446→                    )
   447→                    if adopted is None:
   448→                        raise ContractError(f"Project item alias has no durable linkage: {alias}")
   449→                    adopted["item_id"] = remote_project["item_id"]
   450→                    adopted["linked_at"] = adopted.get("linked_at") or utc_now()
   451→                    adopted["sync_state"] = "linked"
   452→                    adopted["last_error_code"] = None
   453→                    patches.setdefault(node_id, {})["github_project_linkages"] = linkages
   454→                    imports.append({
   455→                        "node": node_id, "alias": alias, "field": "item_id",
   456→                        "from": None, "to": remote_project["item_id"],
   457→                    })
   458→                if not remote_project.get("item_id"):
   459→                    exports.append({
   460→                        "node": node_id, "binding": "github", "kind": "project-item-add", "alias": alias,
   461→                        "project_id": linkage.get("project_id"), "content_id": remote_node.get("id"),
   462→                    })
   463→                base_project = ((base_node.get("projects") or {}).get(alias, {})) if isinstance(base_node, dict) else {}
   464→                next_fields: dict[str, Any] = {}
   465→                mappings = projects[alias].get("field_mappings", [])
   466→                remote_fields = remote_project.get("fields", {})
   467→                for mapping in mappings:
   468→                    if not isinstance(mapping, dict):
   469→                        continue
   470→                    local_field = mapping.get("local_field")
   471→                    project_field = mapping.get("project_field_name")
   472→                    direction = mapping.get("direction")
   473→                    if not local_field or not project_field:
   474→                        continue
   475→                    definition = (remote_project.get("definitions") or {}).get(project_field)
   476→                    if project_field not in remote_fields and not isinstance(definition, dict):
   477→                        pending.append({"node": node_id, "alias": alias, "field": local_field, "reason": "project_field_missing_or_renamed"})
   478→                        continue
   479→                    option_map = mapping.get("option_map") or {}
   480→                    local_value = node.get(local_field)
   481→                    projected_local = option_map.get(str(local_value), local_value) if local_value is not None else None
   482→                    remote_field = remote_fields.get(project_field, {"value": None, "updated_at": None})
   483→                    remote_value = remote_field.get("value") if isinstance(remote_field, dict) else remote_field
   484→                    field_key = f"project:{alias}:{local_field}"
   485→                    if direction == "local_to_project":
   486→                        choice = "equal" if projected_local == remote_value else "local"
   487→                    else:
   488→                        choice = _choose(
   489→                            node_id=node_id,
   490→                            field=field_key,
   491→                            local=projected_local,
   492→                            remote=remote_value,
   493→                            base=base_project.get(local_field) if isinstance(base_project, dict) else None,
   494→                            local_updated=local_updated,
   495→                            remote_updated=remote_field.get("updated_at") if isinstance(remote_field, dict) else None,
   496→                            confirmation=confirmations.get((node_id, field_key)),
   497→                        )
   498→                    if choice == "conflict":
   499→                        conflicts.append({
   500→                            "node": node_id, "alias": alias, "field": local_field,
   501→                            "local": projected_local, "remote": remote_value, "resolution": "manual",
   502→                            "confirmation_required": True,
   503→                        })
   504→                        next_fields[local_field] = base_project.get(local_field, {"local": projected_local, "remote": remote_value})
   505→                    elif choice == "remote":
   506→                        inverse = {value: key for key, value in option_map.items()}
   507→                        if option_map and remote_value not in inverse:
   508→                            pending.append({"node": node_id, "alias": alias, "field": local_field, "reason": "project_option_missing_or_renamed"})
   509→                            continue
   510→                        imported = inverse.get(remote_value, remote_value)
   511→                        if node.get(local_field) != imported:
   512→                            patches.setdefault(node_id, {})[local_field] = imported
   513→                            imports.append({"node": node_id, "alias": alias, "field": local_field, "from": node.get(local_field), "to": imported})
   514→                        next_fields[local_field] = {"local": remote_value, "remote": remote_value}
   515→                    elif choice == "local":
   516→                        definition = (remote_project.get("definitions") or {}).get(project_field, {})
   517→                        value_type = str(mapping.get("value_type") or "single_select")
   518→                        option_id = next((
   519→                            option.get("id") for option in definition.get("options", [])
   520→                            if isinstance(option, dict) and option.get("name") == projected_local
   521→                        ), None)
   522→                        if value_type == "iteration":
   523→                            option_id = next((
   524→                                iteration.get("id")
   525→                                for iteration in (definition.get("configuration") or {}).get("iterations", [])
   526→                                if isinstance(iteration, dict) and iteration.get("title") == projected_local
   527→                            ), None)
   528→                        exports.append({
   529→                            "node": node_id, "binding": "github", "kind": "project-field-update",
   530→                            "alias": alias, "field": local_field, "project_field": project_field,
   531→                            "value": projected_local, "value_type": value_type,
   532→                            "project_id": linkage.get("project_id"), "item_id": effective_item_id,
   533→                            "field_id": definition.get("id") or (remote_field.get("field_id") if isinstance(remote_field, dict) else None),
   534→                            "option_id": option_id,
   535→                        })
   536→                        next_fields[local_field] = {"local": projected_local, "remote": projected_local}
   537→                    else:
   538→                        next_fields[local_field] = {"local": projected_local, "remote": remote_value}
   539→                next_projects[str(alias)] = next_fields
   540→                if linkage.get("sync_state") == "pending_retry":
   541→                    linkages = copy.deepcopy(
   542→                        patches.get(node_id, {}).get(
   543→                            "github_project_linkages", node.get("github_project_linkages") or []
   544→                        )
   545→                    )
   546→                    healed = next(
   547→                        (item for item in linkages if item.get("project_alias") == alias), None
   548→                    )
   549→                    if healed is None:
   550→                        raise ContractError(f"Project retry alias has no durable linkage: {alias}")
   551→                    healed["sync_state"] = "synced" if healed.get("item_id") else "unlinked"
   552→                    healed["last_error_code"] = None
   553→                    healed["last_synced_at"] = utc_now()
   554→                    patches.setdefault(node_id, {})["github_project_linkages"] = linkages
   555→                    imports.append({
   556→                        "node": node_id,
   557→                        "alias": alias,
   558→                        "field": "sync_state",
   559→                        "from": "pending_retry",
   560→                        "to": healed["sync_state"],
   561→                    })
   562→        next_snapshot["nodes"][node_id] = {"binding": binding, "issue": next_issue, "projects": next_projects}
   563→    return {
   564→        "imports": imports,
   565→        "exports": exports,
   566→        "conflicts": conflicts,
   567→        "tombstones": tombstones,
   568→        "pending_retry": pending,
   569→        "patches": patches,
   570→        "next_snapshot": next_snapshot,
   571→    }

   574→def _apply_patch(root: Path, node_id: str, patch: dict[str, Any], upsert: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
   575→    request_dir = repository_eval_root(root) / "dev-graph-sync-requests"
   576→    request_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   577→    request = request_dir / f"{hashlib.sha256(node_id.encode()).hexdigest()}.json"
   578→    atomic_json(request, {"graph_node_id": node_id, "patch": patch})
   579→    try:
   580→        return _invoke(
   581→            [sys.executable, str(upsert), "--repo-root", str(root), "--input", str(request)],
   582→            root,
   583→            f"C02 node patch {node_id}",
   584→        )
   585→    finally:
   586→        try:
   587→            request.unlink()
   588→        except FileNotFoundError:
   589→            pass

   592→def _fixture_apply(remote: dict[str, Any], operation: dict[str, Any], now: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
   593→    binding, node_id = operation["binding"], operation["node"]
   594→    target = _remote_map(remote, binding).get(node_id)
   595→    if not isinstance(target, dict):
   596→        raise ContractError(f"fixture remote node missing for export: {node_id}")
   597→    kind = operation["kind"]
   598→    if kind == "title-update":
   599→        target["title"] = operation["value"]

600→    elif kind == "status-update":
   601→        if binding == "github":
   602→            target["state"] = operation["value"]
   603→        else:
   604→            target["status"] = operation["value"]
   605→    elif kind == "dep-add":
   606→        target["depends_on"] = sorted(set(target.get("depends_on", [])) | {operation["dependency"]})
   607→    elif kind == "dep-remove":
   608→        target["depends_on"] = sorted(set(target.get("depends_on", [])) - {operation["dependency"]})
   609→    elif kind == "project-item-add":
   610→        project = target.setdefault("projects", {}).setdefault(operation["alias"], {})
   611→        if not project.get("item_id"):
   612→            project["item_id"] = f"PVTI_{hashlib.sha256((node_id + ':' + operation['alias']).encode()).hexdigest()[:16]}"
   613→        project.setdefault("fields", {})
   614→        result = {"item_id": project["item_id"]}
   615→    elif kind == "project-field-update":
   616→        project = target.setdefault("projects", {}).setdefault(operation["alias"], {"fields": {}})
   617→        project.setdefault("fields", {})[operation["project_field"]] = {
   618→            "value": operation["value"], "updated_at": now,
   619→            "field_id": operation.get("field_id"), "option_id": operation.get("option_id"),
   620→        }
   621→    else:
   622→        raise ContractError(f"unsupported fixture export operation: {kind}")
   623→    target["updated_at"] = now
   624→    return result if kind == "project-item-add" else {"ok": True}
   625→
   626→
   627→def _live_apply(
   628→    root: Path,
   629→    operation: dict[str, Any],
   630→    node: dict[str, Any],
   631→    bd_bridge: Path,
   632→    gh_bridge: Path,
   633→) -> dict[str, Any]:
   634→    binding, kind = operation["binding"], operation["kind"]
   635→    if binding == "beads":
   636→        issue = (node.get("beads_linkage") or {}).get("bd_issue_id")
   637→        if not issue:
   638→            raise ContractError("Beads export requires beads_linkage.bd_issue_id")
   639→        if kind in {"dep-add", "dep-remove"}:
   640→            argv = [
   641→                sys.executable, str(bd_bridge), "--repo-root", str(root), "--op", kind,
   642→                "--bd-issue-id", str(issue), "--depends-on", str(operation["dependency_issue_id"]),
   643→            ]
   644→        else:
   645→            argv = [sys.executable, str(bd_bridge), "--repo-root", str(root), "--op", "update", "--bd-issue-id", str(issue)]
   646→        if kind == "title-update":
   647→            argv += ["--title", str(operation["value"])]
   648→        elif kind == "status-update":
   649→            argv += ["--status", str(operation["value"])]
   650→        return _invoke(argv, root, f"Beads export {operation['node']}/{kind}")
   651→    linkage = node.get("issue_linkage") or {}
   652→    repo, number = linkage.get("repo"), linkage.get("issue_number")
   653→    if not repo or not number:
   654→        raise ContractError("GitHub export requires issue_linkage")
   655→    if kind == "title-update":
   656→        argv = [sys.executable, str(gh_bridge), "--op", "issue-update", "--repo", str(repo), "--number", str(number), "--title", str(operation["value"])]
   657→    elif kind == "status-update":
   658→        if operation["value"] == "closed":
   659→            argv = [sys.executable, str(gh_bridge), "--op", "issue-close", "--repo", str(repo), "--number", str(number)]
   660→        else:
   661→            raise ContractError("gh-bridge does not support Issue reopen yet")
   662→    elif kind == "project-field-update":
   663→        required = (operation.get("project_id"), operation.get("item_id"), operation.get("field_id"))
   664→        if not all(required):
   665→            raise ContractError("Project field export lacks resolved project/item/field IDs")
   666→        value_type = str(operation.get("value_type") or "single_select")
   667→        argv = [
   668→            sys.executable, str(gh_bridge), "--op", "project-item-edit",
   669→            "--project-id", str(required[0]), "--item-id", str(required[1]),
   670→            "--field-id", str(required[2]), "--value-type", value_type,
   671→        ]
   672→        if value_type in {"single_select", "iteration"}:
   673→            if not operation.get("option_id"):
   674→                raise ContractError(f"Project {value_type} export lacks a resolved option/iteration ID")
   675→            argv += ["--option-id", str(operation["option_id"])]
   676→        else:
   677→            argv += ["--value", str(operation.get("value") if operation.get("value") is not None else "")]
   678→    elif kind == "project-item-add":
   679→        if not operation.get("project_id") or not operation.get("content_id"):
   680→            raise ContractError("Project item add lacks project_id/content_id")
   681→        argv = [
   682→            sys.executable, str(gh_bridge), "--op", "project-item-add",
   683→            "--project-id", str(operation["project_id"]), "--content-id", str(operation["content_id"]),
   684→        ]
   685→    else:
   686→        raise ContractError(f"unsupported live GitHub export operation: {kind}")
   687→    return _invoke(argv, root, f"GitHub export {operation['node']}/{kind}")
   688→
   689→
   690→def _project_linkage_patch(
   691→    node: dict[str, Any], operation: dict[str, Any], receipt: dict[str, Any] | None,
   692→    *, error: str | None = None,
   693→) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
   694→    alias = operation.get("alias")
   695→    if not alias:
   696→        return None
   697→    linkages = copy.deepcopy(node.get("github_project_linkages") or [])
   698→    linkage = next((item for item in linkages if item.get("project_alias") == alias), None)
   699→    if linkage is None:
   700→        raise ContractError(f"Project operation alias has no durable linkage: {alias}")
   701→    now = utc_now()
   702→    if error:
   703→        linkage["sync_state"] = "pending_retry"
   704→        linkage["last_error_code"] = error
   705→        return {"github_project_linkages": linkages}
   706→    if operation.get("kind") == "project-item-add":
   707→        item_id = (receipt or {}).get("item_id")
   708→        if not item_id:
   709→            result = (receipt or {}).get("result") or {}
   710→            item_id = (((result.get("data") or {}).get("addProjectV2ItemById") or {}).get("item") or {}).get("id")
   711→        if not item_id:
   712→            raise ContractError("Project item add receipt omitted item_id")
   713→        linkage["item_id"] = item_id
   714→        linkage["linked_at"] = linkage.get("linked_at") or now
   715→        linkage["sync_state"] = "linked"
   716→    elif operation.get("kind") == "project-field-update":
   717→        snapshot = linkage.setdefault("field_snapshot", {})
   718→        snapshot[str(operation["field"])] = operation.get("value")
   719→        linkage["sync_state"] = "synced"
   720→    linkage["last_synced_at"] = now
   721→    linkage["last_error_code"] = None
   722→    return {"github_project_linkages": linkages}
   723→
   724→
   725→def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:
   726→    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
   727→    parser.add_argument("--repo-root", default=".")
   728→    parser.add_argument("--graph")
   729→    parser.add_argument("--remote-state")
   730→    parser.add_argument("--snapshot", default=".dev-graph/state/sync-snapshot.json")
   731→    mode = parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group(required=True)
   732→    mode.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true")
   733→    mode.add_argument("--apply", action="store_true")
   734→    parser.add_argument("--confirm", action="append", default=[])
   735→    parser.add_argument("--eval-log")
   736→    parser.add_argument("--no-eval-log", action="store_true")
   737→    parser.add_argument("--bd-bridge")
   738→    parser.add_argument("--gh-bridge")
   739→    parser.add_argument("--upsert-node")
   740→    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
   741→
   742→    root = Path(args.repo_root).expanduser().resolve(strict=True)
   743→    config = load_json(root / ".dev-graph" / "config.json")
   744→    if not isinstance(config, dict):
   745→        raise ContractError(".dev-graph/config.json must be an object")
   746→    graph_path = _graph_path(root, args.graph, config)
   747→    ensure_no_pending_transaction(graph_path)
   748→    graph_before = graph_path.read_bytes()
   749→    graph = json.loads(graph_before.decode("utf-8"))
   750→    nodes = graph.get("nodes") if isinstance(graph, dict) else None
   751→    if not isinstance(nodes, list) or not all(isinstance(node, dict) for node in nodes):
   752→        raise ContractError("canonical graph must contain nodes[] objects")
   753→    snapshot_path = _state_path(root, args.snapshot, ".dev-graph/state/sync-snapshot.json", must_exist=False)
   754→    snapshot_before = snapshot_path.read_bytes() if snapshot_path.exists() else None
   755→    snapshot = json.loads(snapshot_before.decode("utf-8")) if snapshot_before is not None else {"schema_version": "1.0", "nodes": {}}
   756→    bd_bridge = Path(args.bd_bridge).resolve() if args.bd_bridge else Path(__file__).with_name("bd-bridge.py")
   757→    gh_bridge = Path(args.gh_bridge).resolve() if args.gh_bridge else Path(__file__).with_name("gh-bridge.py")
   758→    upsert = Path(args.upsert_node).resolve() if args.upsert_node else Path(__file__).with_name("upsert-node.py")
   759→
   760→    remote_path: Path | None = None
   761→    if args.remote_state:
   762→        remote_path = _state_path(root, args.remote_state, "", must_exist=True)
   763→        remote_before = remote_path.read_bytes()
   764→        remote = json.loads(remote_before.decode("utf-8"))
   765→    else:
   766→        remote_before = None
   767→        remote = _collect_remote(root, nodes, config, bd_bridge, gh_bridge)
   768→    if not isinstance(remote, dict):
   769→        raise ContractError("remote state must be an object")
   770→    plan = _plan(nodes, remote, snapshot, config, _confirmations(args.confirm))
   771→    applied: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   772→    failed: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   773→    if args.apply:
   774→        for node_id, patch in sorted(plan["patches"].items()):
   775→            try:
   776→                applied.append({"type": "local", "node": node_id, "receipt": _apply_patch(root, node_id, patch, upsert)})
   777→            except ContractError as exc:
   778→                failed.append({"type": "local", "node": node_id, "reason": str(exc)})
   779→        by_id = {_node_id(node): node for node in nodes}
   780→        fixture_now = utc_now()
   781→        for operation in plan["exports"]:
   782→            try:
   783→                if remote_path is not None:
   784→                    fixture_receipt = _fixture_apply(remote, operation, fixture_now)
   785→                    receipt: dict[str, Any] = {"fixture": True, "operation": operation, **fixture_receipt}
   786→                else:
   787→                    receipt = _live_apply(root, operation, by_id[operation["node"]], bd_bridge, gh_bridge)
   788→                applied.append({"type": "external", "node": operation["node"], "receipt": receipt})
   789→                if operation.get("alias"):
   790→                    current_graph = load_json(graph_path)
   791→                    current_node = next(
   792→                        (item for item in current_graph.get("nodes", []) if _node_id(item) == operation["node"]),
   793→                        None,
   794→                    )
   795→                    if current_node is None:
   796→                        raise ContractError("Project linkage projection node disappeared")
   797→                    linkage_patch = _project_linkage_patch(current_node, operation, receipt)
   798→                    if linkage_patch:
   799→                        projection_receipt = _apply_patch(root, operation["node"], linkage_patch, upsert)
   800→                        applied.append({
   801→                            "type": "local_project_linkage", "node": operation["node"],
   802→                            "alias": operation["alias"], "receipt": projection_receipt,
   803→                        })
   804→            except ContractError as exc:
   805→                reason = str(exc)
   806→                failed.append({"type": "external", "node": operation["node"], "operation": operation, "reason": reason})
   807→                if operation.get("alias"):
   808→                    try:
   809→                        current_graph = load_json(graph_path)
   810→                        current_node = next(
   811→                            (item for item in current_graph.get("nodes", []) if _node_id(item) == operation["node"]),
   812→                            None,
   813→                        )
   814→                        if current_node is not None:
   815→                            pending_patch = _project_linkage_patch(current_node, operation, None, error=reason)
   816→                            if pending_patch:
   817→                                projection_receipt = _apply_patch(root, operation["node"], pending_patch, upsert)
   818→                                applied.append({
   819→                                    "type": "local_pending_retry", "node": operation["node"],
   820→                                    "alias": operation["alias"], "receipt": projection_receipt,
   821→                                })
   822→                    except ContractError as projection_error:
   823→                        failed.append({
   824→                            "type": "local_pending_retry", "node": operation["node"],
   825→                            "reason": str(projection_error),
   826→                        })
   827→        for pending_item in plan["pending_retry"]:
   828→            if not pending_item.get("alias"):
   829→                continue
   830→            current_graph = load_json(graph_path)
   831→            current_node = next(
   832→                (item for item in current_graph.get("nodes", []) if _node_id(item) == pending_item["node"]),
   833→                None,
   834→            )
   835→            if current_node is None:
   836→                continue
   837→            pending_patch = _project_linkage_patch(
   838→                current_node,
   839→                {"alias": pending_item["alias"], "kind": "pending-retry"},
   840→                None,
   841→                error=str(pending_item.get("reason") or "pending_retry"),
   842→            )
   843→            if pending_patch:
   844→                projection_receipt = _apply_patch(root, pending_item["node"], pending_patch, upsert)
   845→                applied.append({
   846→                    "type": "local_pending_retry", "node": pending_item["node"],
   847→                    "alias": pending_item["alias"], "receipt": projection_receipt,
   848→                })
   849→        if remote_path is not None and any(item["type"] == "external" for item in applied):
   850→            atomic_json(remote_path, remote)
   851→        if not plan["conflicts"] and not plan["pending_retry"] and not failed:
   852→            atomic_json(snapshot_path, plan["next_snapshot"])
   853→
   854→    graph_after = graph_path.read_bytes()
   855→    remote_after = remote_path.read_bytes() if remote_path is not None else None
   856→    snapshot_after = snapshot_path.read_bytes() if snapshot_path.exists() else None
   857→    if args.dry_run and graph_after != graph_before:
   858→        raise ContractError("dry-run changed the canonical graph")
   859→    if args.dry_run and remote_after != remote_before:
   860→        raise ContractError("dry-run changed the remote fixture")
   861→    if args.dry_run and snapshot_after != snapshot_before:
   862→        raise ContractError("dry-run changed the sync snapshot")
   863→    report = {
   864→        "ok": not failed,
   865→        "mode": "apply" if args.apply else "dry-run",
   866→        "imports": plan["imports"],
   867→        "exports": plan["exports"],
   868→        "conflicts": plan["conflicts"],
   869→        "tombstones": plan["tombstones"],
   870→        "pending_retry": [*plan["pending_retry"], *failed],
   871→        "changes": len(plan["imports"]) + len(plan["exports"]) + len(plan["tombstones"]),
   872→        "write_count": len(applied),
   873→        "applied": applied,
   874→        "graph_sha256_before": _sha(graph_before),
   875→        "graph_sha256_after": _sha(graph_after),
   876→        "remote_sha256_before": _sha(remote_before),
   877→        "remote_sha256_after": _sha(remote_after),
   878→        "snapshot_sha256_before": _sha(snapshot_before),
   879→        "snapshot_sha256_after": _sha(snapshot_after),
   880→        "converged": not plan["imports"] and not plan["exports"] and not plan["conflicts"] and not plan["pending_retry"] and not failed,
   881→        "executed_at": utc_now(),
   882→    }
   883→    if not args.no_eval_log and args.eval_log:
   884→        eval_root = repository_eval_root(root)
   885→        target = Path(args.eval_log)
   886→        target = target if target.is_absolute() else root / target
   887→        target = contained(target, eval_root, must_exist=False)
   888→        atomic_json(target, report)
   889→        report["eval_log"] = target.relative_to(root).as_posix()
   890→    dump(report)
   891→    return 0 if not failed else 1
   892→
   893→
   894→if __name__ == "__main__":
   895→    try:
   896→        raise SystemExit(main())
   897→    except (ContractError, OSError, json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError, TypeError, ValueError) as exc:
   898→        dump({"ok": False, "error": str(exc), "write_count": 0})
   899→        raise SystemExit(2)
